name: io.github.Rajeev-Shyam/quellgeist-commits
description: Read-only MCP server exposing get_recent_commits over a local deploy/commit log (JSON). Part of Quellgeist first-line incident triage.

environmentVariables.name: QG_DEPLOY_LOG
environmentVariables.description: Path to the deploy/commit log to read (default: demo/deploy_log.json, resolved against the working directory).
